findings.description: The source h2 section (marked with `------`) contains 6 h3-level subsections (marked with `====`): 簡易検索機能を使用する場合, like条件をもつ簡易検索の場合, 可変条件のSQLの場合, IN句の条件が動的に変わる場合, ORDER BY句を動的に変更する場合, 大量データを検索する場合. The total plain text is well over 2000 characters and h3 sections exist, but the knowledge file does not split — all content is consolidated into a single section s1.
findings.source_evidence:
Source has 6 subsections under the top-level heading, each introduced with `====` underlines (e.g., `簡易検索機能を使用する場合
==========================`, `like条件をもつ簡易検索の場合
============================`, etc.).
